definitions: The act or process of removing usable parts from something for use in building or repairing another item.
The reduction in sales of an existing product due to the introduction of a new product by the same company.
The act of one part of a company or organization consuming the resources or market share of another part.
examples: The cannibalization of old computers provided essential parts.
The new product led to significant cannibalization of the older model.
Internal cannibalization of resources was a concern.
